cases.source: Price elasticity of demand measures responsiveness of quantity demanded to price changes.
cases.content: Price elasticity of demand measures how responsive quantity demanded is when prices change.

cases.source: The speed of light in a vacuum is 299,792,458 m/s. Newton formulated the laws of motion.
cases.content: The speed of light in a vacuum is 299,792,458 m/s.

cases.source: Supply and demand determine market equilibrium in competitive markets. Equilibrium price clears the market.
cases.content: Supply and demand determine market equilibrium when competitive markets clear at equilibrium price.

cases.content: Einstein invented macroeconomics in 1920. Price elasticity measures responsiveness.
